_comment: MCP server registry for ForgeML Traffic Congestion Predictor.
_usage: Add this file's mcpServers block to your Claude Desktop config or pass to an MCP client.

traffic-prediction.description: ML-powered congestion prediction, 24-hour risk forecasting, and feature inspection.
example_queries: What will congestion be at 5 PM on Friday in August with light rain?
Predict congestion for rush hours [7, 8, 17, 18] on a Tuesday
Show me the 24-hour risk forecast for a rainy Monday in October
What are the top features driving traffic predictions?

traffic-analytics.description: Statistical analysis of 48K-record dataset — hourly profiles, weather effects, segment risk.
example_queries: Which hour of the day has the highest average traffic on I-94?
How does rainy weather affect Metro I-94 traffic volumes?
What percentage of records are High or Severe congestion?
Which I-94 segments are High or above at 5 PM on Friday?

traffic-insights.description: Rule-based AI explanation engine — why predictions are made, action plans, system insights.
example_queries: Why is traffic predicted as Severe at 5 PM on a Friday?
What actions should traffic managers take during High congestion?
Give me a natural-language traffic intelligence report for Tuesday at 8 AM
What are the most important system-level insights from the data?

traffic-map.description: I-94 corridor spatial intelligence — per-segment congestion, bottleneck history, geometry.
example_queries: Which I-94 segments are congested at 8 AM on Monday?
What is the worst hour for the I-35W interchange segment?
List all I-94 segments that are historically bottlenecks
Show the full corridor congestion map for Friday evening rush

claude_desktop_integration._note: To use with Claude Desktop, add the mcpServers entries above to:
claude_desktop_integration._remember: Set the 'cwd' field to the project root directory for each server.
